# P attribute: custom program says target is up to date (exit 0 = fresh)
cp target target
cp dep dep
mk -p 1 -f mkfile target
# Recipe should NOT run since custom program says up to date
! stdout 'rebuilding'

-- mkfile --
target:Psh -c 'exit 0': dep
	echo rebuilding
-- target --
content
-- dep --
content
